reviews.title: Totaaly useless
reviews.text:
When I arrived they denied that I had a reservation, then wanted to see my Agoda booking ID, they asked me to e-mail it to them, nothing unusual here, but... at this point a large coach party arrived and they asked me to wait while they sorted out my booking! What they meant was sit down while we book in this large group of tourists who have taken your room. They had deleted my booking to take the coach party! After an hour they told me that some rooms had a problem with the water supply (but if you count the number of people in the coach party and the number of rooms in the hotel you know they are lying). So they 'offered' to move me to another hotel. When I came to check out at the other hotel a week later they insisted I pay them for my room! It took 30 mins of intense arguing before they accepted that I had already paid via Agoda.
This hotel has no problems deleting your booking to make the maximum amount of money from a large group. Save the hassle, don't stay here, go somewhere else, there are better hotels to coose from.

reviews.text:
One receptionist and the house keepers were really professional and helpful. 
The rest of the staff especially the young receptionists were extremely rude and had no knowledge of how to be hotel receptionist. If I was their boss I would would sack them immediately. 
Every complaint I made which was valid was met with hostility by the young receptionists. The bar fridge in my room was not working I asked the young receptionists to attend to it and I was basically ignored after 4 days of complaining it was still not fixed. The moto bike I rented from the hotel was not road worthy I again asked the young receptionists to exchange the bike. Again I was met wit hostility until I told her to take the bike away and I would not pay for it that she organised to change the moto bike.

reviews.title: Nice but not Satisfactory
reviews.text: I arrived at the hotel around 9pm, and I was happily welcomed by the staff. After a few minutes of staying in my Superior Double Room at Room 503, I noticed that the air-conditioning system is not working really well, so I called the front desk to inform about it. I've waited for them to attend my concern for like 10 minutes, but no one came knocking on my door. Because of this, I went down to the front desk to ask them again. I saw that the receptionist assigned that time, whom I believed answered my call too, was just browsing the Internet and surprised to see me. I reminded him of my concern, and since I need to go out to have dinner, I just told him that I hope that by the time I came back, they've already fixed the air-conditioning system. After an hour or two, I came back, and to much disappointed, they didn't do anything about my concern. So disappointed. Good thing, I'm only staying there for one night. This almost ruined my wonderful trip in Vietnam and Cambodia.

reviews.title: Room Size embellishment
reviews.text:
I booked a Superior Double Room and it was advertised on Agoda as being 20 square meters with City Views. The room was actually 17 square meters and it has a window, but the window faces a wall so "City View" is not accurate.

The receptionist offered me the Deluxe Room for an additional $5. I took the offer since it has a balcony and windows that face the street. The Deluxe room is advertised on Agoda as 24 square meters, but it's actually 20 square meters.

Other than that this hotel is quite nice and elegant, which a touch of a high class feel. The room has a comfortable chair and desk so you can work. It even has an ethernet port inside the room if the wifi is not sufficient. Internet speeds were 50 down, 50 up.

They have books and little sculptures in the room to give it a touch of class. Walk around the block and you will see restaurants, cafes, and 2 bars. The War Remnants Museum is walking distance.

A lot of people are confusing this hotel for the Hong Hac Hotel located on 34A Thu Khoa Huan Street. I've stayed in that one as well and this hotel is a lot nicer.

Room Tip: Book the Superior room, then upgrade to the deluxe room for $5 more.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Điểm: 10/10 – Exceptional

Tôi vừa có một kỳ nghỉ rất hài lòng tại khách sạn này. Phòng sạch sẽ, thoáng và được dọn dẹp hằng ngày rất cẩn thận. Giường ngủ êm, cách âm tốt nên tôi ngủ rất ngon. Vị trí khách sạn trung tâm, thuận tiện đi lại và dễ tìm quán ăn, cà phê, siêu thị ngay gần.

Nhân viên lễ tân và housekeeping cực kỳ thân thiện, hỗ trợ nhanh mọi yêu cầu. Tôi đặc biệt ấn tượng với sự nhiệt tình khi tôi cần nhận phòng sớm và gửi hành lý – tất cả đều được xử lý rất chuyên nghiệp. Wi-Fi mạnh, điều hòa hoạt động tốt, nước nóng ổn định – những chi tiết nhỏ nhưng làm trải nghiệm rất trọn vẹn.

So với mức giá, tôi thấy chất lượng hoàn toàn xứng đáng, thậm chí còn vượt mong đợi. Nếu có dịp quay lại khu vực này, tôi chắc chắn sẽ tiếp tục chọn A25 Trương Định. Rất phù hợp cho cả khách du lịch lẫn công tác.

Highly recommended!

reviews.title: Felt cheated
reviews.text: My fiancee and I booked for 7 nights arriving on Saturday the 29th of August. When we arrived we were told that the Deluxe Double bedroom we booked was not available until the coming Monday because they needed to fix something in the room. We accepted the situation and went up to our room. I decided however to check the website a couple of hours later to see if there were any Deluxe Double bedrooms for Hong Hac hotel left to see if they were telling me the truth. To my surprise and anger I found 2 Deluxe Double rooms showing as available. 2 not 1. I then suspected that maybe they wanted to keep the Double beds for last minute weekend guests. Just to make sure, my Vietnamese fiancee called reception to ask if there were Deluxe Double rooms available for the next 2 nights and they said YES!! I confronted them the next morning and their excuse was that the website had not been updated and the receptionist who answered did not read her notes when she started her shift. My response to that was why were there 2 rooms showing as available and secondly, if no deluxe double bedrooms were available, why did the manager who was there, not inform his staff of an important piece of information like that? You be the judge!!!
reviews.positives: Location & toliet design

reviews.title: Phòng rộng rãi, view phố đẹp, nhân viên rất dễ thương - trên cả mong đợi!
reviews.positives:
Mình ở đây dạng staycation và thực sự hài lòng với mọi thứ. Phòng rộng rãi sạch sẽ, có ban công nhìn ra phố, ban công còn có cây xanh tạo cảm giác rất thoáng đãng, dễ chịu. Buổi sáng ra ngồi đây nhâm nhi tách cà phê ngắm thành phố là hết ý (cà phê và trà mình thấy trong phòng có miễn phí)

Nhân viên vô cùng thân thiện và nhiệt tình, từ lễ tân đến buồng phòng đều chủ động hỗ trợ khi cần. Không khí ở khách sạn khiến mình cảm thấy ấm áp, không máy móc như nhiều nơi khác.

Bữa sáng buffet khiến mình khá bất ngờ vì không nghĩ với giá này lại được dùng buffet với khá nhiều món, nhân viên túc trực đảm bảo đồ ăn luôn được châm đầy đủ và nóng hổi. Khu ăn sáng không quá rộng nhưng decor đẹp, nhẹ nhàng, tạo cảm giác dễ chịu.

Trong phòng thì đúng kiểu “nhỏ nhưng có võ”: đầy đủ tiện nghi hơn mong đợi, từ máy sấy tóc, ấm siêu tốc, tủ lạnh mini, hộp kim chỉ, đến cả nhíp, bấm móng tay, kéo,..gì cũng có. Mình ấn tượng nhất là chỗ dầu gội, sữa tắm, dầu xả và sữa rửa mặt không dùng loại chiết nhỏ mà dùng cả chai to của thương hiệu nổi tiếng, cảm thấy an tâm khi sử dụng.

Chắc chắn sẽ giới thiệu cho gia đình và bạn bè trải nghiệm.

reviews.title: A good budget option
reviews.text: The hotel is located across the huge Tan Dao park, 10 minutes on foot to the iconic tourist spots like the Notre Dame Cathedral Saigon, the Ben Thanh market, etc. I had a room with balcony, but it's rather small. So is the bathroom. The pillows and linens are very clean, but they haven't changed the AC filters for ages. The dust is clearly visible. The a la carte breakfast with 4-5 choices on my first day was miserly, but the buffet on the following days was quite good.  The dining areas is small; it probably can't accommodate 20 people. Staff was polite and responsive but was short of manpower. They didn't make up my room until 2pm and the front desk took 15 minutes to check out the many guests leaving at the same time. I would try other choices around the location before it next time I am in town.

reviews.title: Very Good Again
reviews.text:
Second time staying here while passing through Saigon. This time had 2 rooms booked for myself and my dad. Both rooms were on the 2nd floor, his by the elevator and mine with the balcony. Once again no complaints on this hotel! The staff is helpful, the breakfast is very good and the rooms are very clean. The rooms have everything you need when travelling and would definitely recommend getting one with a balcony. My dad even mentioned they had CNN on the TV. 

The location is good, close to some of the touristy spots and a decent walk to a lot of others. Lots of restaurants and coffee shops close by as well. 

I've stayed here twice and will again if looking for a hotel in Saigon again.

reviews.title: Good location and a nice modern hotel.
reviews.text:
The hotel is a nice modern hotel, only 5 minutes from the war museum. The breakfast had a good range and the rooms were nice and clean.

However, the walls sounded like they were being hammered on when it rained. So if you sleep lightly, it may not be the best for your stay. 

The biggest negative was at the end of our stay, when the hotel tried to con us with a taxi to the airport. They tried to charge us double the rate of a metred taxi and provide us with a small car which was driven by a friend or relative of the hotel staff. This was not acceptable and I had to argue for my money back and got a separate taxi as a result.

reviews.title: Worth for your money
reviews.text: Very close to downtown and lots of restaurants & food vendors around. Cleanliness and quite atmosphere even located in very high traffic area. Room has all amenities, from toothbrush, tooth paste, comb, razor, iron, hair dryer to slippers and bathrobes. I love the shower stand not let the water splashes out over the floor as in many hotels in Vietnam. If you like a spacious room, book a double-bed room instead of 2-twin bed room (they have the same  room size. very nice and helpful staff. Delicious breakfast buffet with menu changed daily. But the hotel doesn't have swimming pool & gym. If you want to stay close to downtown at a decent hotel  and with reasonable price, full amenities, not a luxury (as in the hotel's name) , this is a good choice.

The location is perfect - very close to most of the tourist attractions (War Remnant Museum, Notre Dame Cathedral and Ben Thanh Market). A lot of shops and restaurants in the area. The room is small but clean and comfy. Super love the breakfast, two thumbs up! The staff were extremely helpful. They helped organize a quick tour and looked up how to take transport to certain sights for us. I would recommend this hotel for great value for money and location. Overall, it was a very pleasant stay and will definitely go back again when we visit Saigon next time.

reviews.title: Staffs are not as friendly as expected
reviews.text: Good location and good price as it is just right at the border line of Q1. Staffs are not as friendly like other hotels but this can be improved easily.  Overall, I highly recommend this hotel. I will be back on my next trip to Saigon

reviews.title: Great place to stay in Saigon!
reviews.text: The room we had was really nice. New and clean. I loved the bathroom.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
I fell sick while I was in Saigon. As a solo traveler, getting sick while traveling is your worst nightmare!

But the hotel staff bought medicines for me, and even lead me to the nearest clinic -- next door. There was even a time when their manager rang my room just to check how I was.

reviews.title: Hong hac
reviews.text: Good location - a street away from district 1. Clean and friendly. Rooms small but have the facilities needed (just don't open the wardrobe if your sharing with friends and they are in the shower, as it has a glass back into the shower - bathroom door also glass and not soundproof but turning the TV on helps).

reviews.title: It's really value for money
reviews.text: I enjoyed my stay at the hotel. The price was reasonable considering that it's a relatively new hotel. The design of ths hotel itself was also unique.
reviews.positives: I liked the location of the hotel. They maintain its cleanliness and they always replenish the amenities.

reviews.title: 1 night review
reviews.text: Nice place 15-20 min walk to everything. I'd go back for the breakfast!
reviews.response: We would like to take this opportunity to thank you for choosing A25 Hotel and sharing your feedback with us. We are happy to know that you had a pleasant stay with us on this trip. We look forward to the opportunity to welcome you back so we can serve you with all our hospitality.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Hotel near the park, with parking right in front of the hotel, located in District 1, quite expensive, small rooms. Bed sheets and pillows are clean but the desk and cabinet are very dusty. Breakfast buffet is varied.
reviews.response:
Chúng tôi chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ cảm nhận và gửi tặng điểm số rất cao cho khách sạn. Đây là sự ghi nhận quý giá và là nguồn động lực lớn đối với toàn bộ đội ngũ A25 Hotel. 

  

Bên cạnh những trải nghiệm tích cực mà Quý khách đã hài lòng, chúng tôi cũng xin được gửi lời xin lỗi chân thành vì những điểm chưa thật sự hoàn hảo trong quá trình lưu trú. Những góp ý về tình trạng vệ sinh bàn tủ và một vài chi tiết trong phòng sẽ được chúng tôi nghiêm túc kiểm tra lại và điều chỉnh ngay để đảm bảo mang đến chất lượng tốt hơn trong thời gian tới. 

  

Một lần nữa, chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã tin tưởng lựa chọn A25 Hotel. Rất mong sẽ được đón tiếp Quý khách trở lại và mang đến một kỳ nghỉ trọn vẹn hơn trong tương lai.

reviews.title: underrated hotel
reviews.text: surprisingly good hotel with comfy bed and full of amenities. the only thing you may find annoying is the soundproofing ability of the room. the walls are so thin. as long as next-door guests won't go wild, you may get a good sleep. overall,  good for what you pay for.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for your detailed and honest feedback.
We are delighted to hear that you found our hotel comfortable and well-equipped with amenities.

We also appreciate your constructive comments regarding the soundproofing. Please be assured that we take this matter seriously and will continue to explore ways to improve our facilities to ensure a more restful stay for our guests.

Your satisfaction is very important to us, and we hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future.

reviews.title: Terrific Value & Service
reviews.text:
This hotel chain has many locations throughout HCM. However this specific location of Truong Dinh in District 3 is on the higher tier compared to the others. 

1. The quality and decor is modern and  refreshing

2. The room amenities are excellent for the price you pay. includes good quality toothbrushes, shampoo, body wash, and 2 free bottles of water.

3. The bed sheets and bath towels are fresh and nice scent

4. The service staff all around are very helpful. 

5. location is awesome. Cafe Highlands next door, mini market across the street. A health clinic next door. several eateries and cafes within 3-5 minutes walking. 

Great Stay
reviews.response: We would like to take this opportunity to thank you for choosing A25 Hotel and sharing your feedback with us. We are delighted to read that you had a pleasant stay during your vacation with us. We look forward to having a chance to welcome you back so that we could serve you with our best hospitality.

reviews.title: Value for Money at excellent Location
reviews.text: Good value for money. Bed was comfortable. Toiletries were provided daily. Iron board and Iron Box was available. Bath robes were provided. Along with normal toiletries like Brush, Paste we were provided with small comb, hair tie. There was a nailcutter too, which we didnt see in any other stay at Vietnam. The only con I would say is The place was a bit cramped comparing to the other accommodations we have been to/used to. But that didnt lessen our experience in anyway. Very near to all sightseeing places. we walked to almost all the surrounding places. There was a park just across the road from the hotel. Buffet Breakfast was good.  They can include whether an item is Veg or Non-veg in the name plate for each item. All in all a good value for money!!

reviews.title: 4/5 stars
reviews.text: Staff members may not easily understand and speak English, but they try their best. This hotel is a good find.

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text: Location cleanliness and facilities are amazing

reviews.title: Good For Value
reviews.text: Its good for value, good location and good service

reviews.title: Hong Hac Boutique Hotel Saigon
reviews.text: Well located accommodation. Central to all cool sights and spots.

reviews.title: Great!
reviews.text: The hotel is great and clean. One thing bothered me, I was booking for two nights but when I arrived the hotel the manager told me that there's a problem in the room so they arranged me another hotel for my first night. The another hotel I stayed was not good as this hotel although the price is the same.

reviews.title: Very nice stay! Impressive interior
reviews.text: The room was super clean. The interior is unexpectedly nice. The bathroom is so cool. Only 1 drawback is the room cannot block noise away outside, when i slept there i could clearly hear what cleaner was doing out of the room and the noise of closing door. If you dont have sleep problem like me, everything is perfect.
